creator: kevinz5000@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 256363
Patch

mbedtls2 is going away because it's no longer supported upstream.

mbedtls2 is being used to build this port because the port can't be built because an old OpenSSL 3 API is being used. However this is only a debugging facility and can be safely removed.

This patch unexpires this port by switching this build to OpenSSL and dropping the mbedtls dependency.

I use this port so if it is in need of a maintainer, I'm happy to take over.
